card.name: Gyatt
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gains backbone. (This creature assigns combat damage equal to its toughness instead of its power.) When this enchantment enters, draw a card.

card.name: Change da World
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent without a supertype.

card.name: Dab
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2, has banding, and is a token in addition to its other types.

card.name: Idol Meeting
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature is a planeswalker.

card.name: Unsung Hero
card.text: This card has no name. Lifelink

card.name: Ice Cream Vendor
card.text: When this creature enters the battlefield, you gain 1 life for each zone in which you have a card.

card.name: PeNgU1N oF d00m
card.text: Banding This creature gets +1/+1 for each other creature in a band with it.

card.name: Slayin' Queen
card.text: Protection from basic (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything basic.)

card.name: Vtuber Unicorn
card.text: As this creature enters the battlefield, choose target creature. If the target creature would die, this creature dies instead.

card.name: Glaze
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Prevent all damage that would be dealt to enchanted creature the turn this Aura enters. Whenever enchanted creature changes status, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Task Manager
card.text: Banding Creatures in a band with this creature get +1/+1.

card.name: Lorewriter
card.text: {2}{W}: This creature gains all the abilities target creature lost this turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Gamers Rise Up
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. Gamers you control gain your choice of absorb, afflict, bushido or frenzy until end of turn. The value for the chosen ability is 1.

card.name: Podcast Listener
card.text: This creature can only attack or block in a band.

card.name: Cinema
card.text: You gain 1 life for each game action that happened this turn.

card.name: Jxb Application
card.text: Enchant opponent Special actions enchanted opponent takes use the stack.

card.name: Influencer
card.text: {W}, {T}: The controller of another target creature casts it without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Seiso Idol
card.text: This creature's text box can't change.
Target permanent loses all types, all abilities and has no name until end of turn.

card.name: Put the Fries in the Bag
card.text: Counter target spell with no target.

card.name: Gynoid Combatant
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, Gynoid Combatant gains prowess.

card.name: Clickbait
card.text: Change the target of target spell or ability to target permanent. Replaces all instances of card names in that spell or ability to the target permanent's name.

card.name: Free Bird
card.text: Flying Banding (Any creatures with banding, and up to one without, can attack in a band. Bands are blocked as a group. If any creatures with banding you control are blocking or being blocked by a creature, you divide that creature's combat damage, not its controller, among any of the creatures it's being blocked by or is blocking.) Creatures in a band with Free Bird have flying.

card.name: Parasocial Streamer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters the battlefield, choose target creature. That creature always has the same states as this creature.

card.name: Stun Snidd
card.text: Stun Snidd deals damage in the form of stun counters. Remove two stun counters from among permanents: Conjure a Sea Snidd into your hand.

card.name: Vtuber Manager
card.text: {U}, {T}: Change a status of target creature to its other value.

card.name: Yassify
card.text: Choose one, then choose another for each card named Yassify you own in each public zone. • Put a flying counter on target creature. • Put a mentor counter on target creature. • Put a banding counter on target creature. • Put a prowess counter on target creature. • Put a horsemanship counter on target creature. • Put a vigilance counter on target creature.

card.name: All According to Keikaku
card.text: Draw a card for each different supertype among permanents you control.

card.name: Sketchy Rakugaki
card.text: Whenever this creature enters the battlefield or attacks, target permanent.

card.name: Blogger
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, note the text of that spell. If you've already noted the same text, draw a card.

card.name: Six Seven
card.text: Choose one— • Target creature's base power and toughness is 6/7 until end of turn. • Change any amount or value on a spell you control to six or seven.

card.name: Cancelled
card.text: Counter target spell. Then choose one at random— • Its controller mills three cards. • If that spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard. • Scry 1. • Its controller draws a card. Draw a card. • Draw a card, then discard a card. • Surveil 1. • If that spell's mana value was 3 or less, proliferate. • Amass Orcs 1.

card.name: Tralalero Tralala
card.text: Landwalk (This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Land.)

card.name: Ponder the Orb
card.text: Scry 1, surveil 1, fateseal 1, clash with an opponent. If you win, discover X, where X is the number of cards put on the bottom of a library with this card.

card.name: Slide into DMs
card.text: Conjure a card named Unread Message into target player's hand. As long as they have that card in their hand, they play with their hand revealed. (It's a sorcery that costs {2} with "Draw a card.") Draw a card.

card.name: Sandbox Gamer
card.text: {U}, {T}: Add flash, "this spell can't be countered" or affinity for Gamers to a spell you control as you cast it.

card.name: Twink Death
card.text: Enchant creature without summoning sickness Enchanted creature gets -2/-2. Put a stun counter on it whenever it becomes tapped.

card.name: Brainrot
card.text: Enchant opponent Enchanted opponent must follow the Chains of Mephistopheles flowchart.

card.name: Become Uncanny
card.text: Target creature's base power and toughness become its negatives until end of turn.

card.name: Discord Kitten
card.text: You may redirect damage dealt to this creature to a creature with composite mana value you control.

card.name: Bruh Moment
card.text: Target player discards two cards. Then choose one at random— • That player mills two cards, and loses 2 life. • Exile that player's graveyard. • If you attacked this turn, create a Treasure token. • Ninjas and Rogues you control gain menace until end of turn. • You mill two cards. • You create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed.

card.name: Drip
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +3/+0, has menace and can be enchanted as though it didn't have protection.

card.name: Eat Hot Chip and Lie
card.text: Eat Hot Chip and Lie costs {1} less to cast for each mulligan you took this game. Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: I Lived
card.text: Sacrifice a creature, then return it to the battlefield.

card.name: Gamer (Derogatory)
card.text: If you've won a game this match, Gamer (derogatory) gets +3/+0. If you've lost a game this match, Gamer (derogatory) gets +0/+3.

card.name: Schrödinger's Catgirl
card.text: You may cast this creature from your graveyard. {T}: This creature dies.

card.name: Girl Failure
card.text: Whenever you fail to find, you may conjure a copy of Girl Failure into your hand.

card.name: Cryptobro
card.text: If you control three or more nonland permanents with consecutive mana values, you may increase a number or amount in a permanent you control by 1. Pay 2 life: Exchange a card you own in ante with a card in your hand.

card.name: Roguelike Adventurer
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, venture into a dungeon you haven't ventured yet. If you can't, enter a random room. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)

card.name: Slop Consumer
card.text: You may reveal this creature as you draw it or if it's in your starting hand. If you do, discard it.

card.name: Paid Sponsor
card.text: Raid — When this creature enters the battlefield, if you attacked with a creature this turn, create a Treasure token. Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Legends you control gain Ward—Pay 1 life. (By Legends I mean legendary permanents you goofball.)

card.name: Unalive
card.text: A creature of your choice dies.

card.name: Bad to the Bone
card.text: Haste {B}: Regenerate this creature. Regenerating doesn't remove this creature from combat.

card.name: Actual Shitposter
card.text: {T}: Regenerate target creature, then destroy it.

card.name: Burninate
card.text: This spell deals damage to any target equal to the greatest generic cost among permanents you control.

card.name: Do a Little Trolling
card.text: Target land is a creature.

card.name: Festival Priestess
card.text: {1}{R}{R}: : Play a random effect.

card.name: Fumble a Baddie
card.text: Target creature deals lethal damage to itself.

card.name: Insane Troll Logic
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Insane Troll Logic, draw two cards. Your maximum hand size this turn is zero.

card.name: Isekai Maiden
card.text: Isekai Maiden gets +2/+2 as long as you've cast a world spell this turn.

card.name: Mucho Texto
card.text: Target spell loses its text box.

card.name: Techno Viking
card.text: When Techno Viking enters the battlefield, play a random fast effect.

card.name: Down Bad
card.text: The Ring tempts you. Take the initiative. Venture into the dungeon. If you have the city's blessing, face the Hydra.

card.name: IPad Baby
card.text: If IPad Baby would be put under certain status, it gets the opposite status instead.

card.name: First!
card.text: This spell deals 3 damage to any target. It deals 2 damage to you unless it's the first spell cast this game.

card.name: First Person Shooter
card.text: {T}: You deal 1 damage to target player.

card.name: Keyboard Warrior
card.text: Provoke (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block it if able.) This creature has the textbox of all the permanents it has dealt damage to.

card.name: Edgelord
card.text: This creature attacks each turn if able. Prevent all excess damage this creature would deal.

card.name: Chicken Jockey
card.text: Horsemanship (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with horsemanship.) At the beginning of combat during your turn, you may have this creature's power become any number or amount on a spell you've cast this turn until end of turn.

card.name: Silly Little Guy
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Reselect targets at random of any spell that targets this creature.

card.name: Chūnibyō Weeb
card.text: Bushido 2 (Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, it gets +2/+2 until end of turn.) At the beginning of combat each turn, you may subtract numbers from this creature's soulshift to adds to its bushido and vice versa until end of turn. Soulshift 2 (When this creature dies, you may return target Spirit card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.) Ninjutsu {4}{B} Gamer offering ({4}{B}, sacrifice a Gamer and pay the difference in mana costs, including color, between this and the sacrificed Gamer. Return an unblocked attacker you control to hand: Put this card onto the battlefield from your hand tapped and attacking.)

card.name: Face Eating Leopard
card.text: First strike At the beginning of your upkeep, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent it has dealt damage this game.

card.name: Girldinner
card.text: Target token becomes Food.

card.name: Big if True
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn if it has flying. The same is true for every other keyword ability.

card.name: Touch Grass
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card. Play it.

card.name: Defluencing
card.text: Artifact and enchantment lose all types, names and abilities until end of turn. Same is true for artifact and enchantment cards not on the battlefield.

card.name: Squatting друг
card.text: Squatting друг can only attack or block while tapped.

card.name: Wholesome Pupperino
card.text: After you mulligan, if you have four or less cards in your starting hand, you may reveal Wholesome Pupperino from your library or outside the game and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: La Creatura
card.text: La fuerza y resistencia de esta criatura son iguales al mayor coste genérico entre los costes de mana de los permanentes que controlas.

card.name: The Wolf Inside
card.text: Emerge {6} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.) As The Wolf Inside enters, create a 3/3 green Wolf creature token. When you attack with this creature, also tap that token, same is true for tapping, untapping, blocking, getting destroyed, exiled or taking damage.

card.name: Forum Troll
card.text: {1}{G}: Regenerate this creature. You may counter an activated ability each turn.

card.name: Obvious Plant
card.text: Defender If you would create a token, you might instead put this creature onto the battlefield from any zone other than your library.

card.name: Geo Guesser
card.text: When this creature enters, each player secretly names a Basic land type. Create a land token that's none of the types chosen. If all land types were chosen this way, create a Wastes token instead.

card.name: Hypebeast
card.text: This creature always counts as having an aura enchanting it. Auras enchanting this creature can't be unattached from it.

card.name: Firebomb a Walmart
card.text: Choose one— • Destroy target noncreature permanent. • Exile target non-commander card in the command zone.

card.name: Juan.
card.text: Manhorseship (This creature can block creatures with horsemanship.) Exhaust — {G}: You gain 1 life for each card you own on the command zone.

card.name: Interior Crocodile Alligator
card.text: When a Vehicle crewed by this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, you may have the next instant or sorcery spell you cast this turn gain rerun. (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. Whenever a creature you control dies, you may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost.) (Yes this is for flavor.)

card.name: Washed Goat
card.text: During your cleanup step, for each point of damage removed from this creature, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Woke Dog
card.text: Creatures you control have Ward {X}, where X is every card type they have beyond the first. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {X}.) Awaken 4 {6}{G} (If you cast this spell for {6}{G}, also put four +1/+1 counters on target land you control and it becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with haste. It's still a land.)

card.name: Jane Metroidvania
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, venture into the dungeon. While venturing into the dungeon, you may return to the previous room rather than enter the next one.

card.name: Gone to Brazil
card.text: Put target creature outside the game. Their owner may put another card they own from outside the game into their hand.

card.name: Snow Halation
card.text: Prevent all damage that would be dealt by permanent spells cast this turn.

card.name: Professional Moderator
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink Players can't skip steps.

card.name: Vibe Check
card.text: Choose target permanent and target permanent spell that share a card type. The target permanent is world, and the permanent spell enters the battlefield as world until end of turn.

card.name: Horny Jail
card.text: Sources can't deal damage to you unless their owner pays {1} for each other source they control that has already dealt damage to you this turn.

card.name: Simp
card.text: As this creature enters the battlefield, another target creature you control becomes a Commander. This effect doesn't end if that creature leaves the battlefield. (Even if you weren't playing commander).

card.name: Quirked up White Boy
card.text: Provoke (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block it if able.) Distorted (This creature can be blocked by tapped creatures but not untapped creatures.)

card.name: Fanum Tax
card.text: Target spell costs {2} more to cast.

card.name: A Real One
card.text: Other permanents lose legendary. The same is true for spells and creature cards that aren't on the battlefield.

card.name: Art Mama
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, Put a "Bands with other creatures with a bands with other creatures counter" counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Nothing ever Happens
card.text: End the phase.

card.name: Animutation
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gains its abilities.

card.name: Crack Pairing
card.text: Target creature become a copy of another target creature controlled by the same player until end of turn. Both are legendary until end of turn.

card.name: Ted, the Talker
card.text: Sacrifice this creature: Change the text of target instant or sorcery spell by replacing all instances of "each" with "target", its controller may choose new targets for it.

card.name: Spelln't
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Spelln't, counter target spell.

card.name: Head Out
card.text: The stack phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.) Draw a card.

card.name: Uno Reverse Card
card.text: Change the target of target spell that targets you. The new target must be its owner. Reverse the turn order.

card.name: Install Wizard
card.text: When this creature enters the battlefield, you may have it become a trigger event for a triggered ability of a permanent on the battlefield.

card.name: Game Theorist
card.text: Flying If an effect would exile a permanent and then return it to the battlefield, that permanent is the same object.

card.name: Rig Papa
card.text: Other creatures and permanents without type you control gain reconfigure {4}. Creatures that get a permanent attached this way gain all the abilities of their attached permanent. Transfigure {1}{U}{U}

card.name: Epic Fail
card.text: If an effect would make an opponent discard a card while they have no cards in hand, they lose 3 life instead.

card.name: Nothing Personel Kid
card.text: Exile target creature with composite power.

card.name: Pyramid Schemer
card.text: Flying As this creature enters, choose an Ongoing Scheme you own from outside the game and set it in motion on your command zone. Abandon that Scheme when this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Soyjack
card.text: This creature can't block. If you would sacrifice a creature as part of a cost, you may sacrifice this creature instead.

card.name: Totally Xtreme
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Totally Xtreme, exile a creature card you own from outside the game. Target player gets X rad counters, where X is the power of the exiled creature.

card.name: Shadow Wizard Money Gang
card.text: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) This creature deals combat damage in the form of Treasure tokens. {2}{B}: Exchange this creature with a creature card in your hand. If this creature was attacking, that creature enters attacking.

card.name: Collection Scalper
card.text: As you cast this creature, choose an expansion. Target player reveals their hand. Choose a card with a name originally printed in that expansion. that player discards that card.

card.name: Real Hater
card.text: Whenever an effect an opponent controls causes you to pay a cost, that opponent loses 2 life. Other creatures with abilities that say "can't" get -1/-1.

card.name: Shounen Protagonist
card.text: You may sacrifice this creature to copy any One-Shot effect you control.

card.name: Go Live
card.text: Put target creature card in a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. If that creature had died, it gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Stream Sniper
card.text: Whenever one or more cards become revealed, this creature deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Delet This
card.text: If you haven't suspended a card from outside the game this game, you may put a card in your opening hand outside the game and suspend this card from outside the game with two time counters. This spell deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Parking Lot Brawler
card.text: Provoke (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block it if able.) {Q}: Remove target blocking creature from combat. Creatures it was blocking that hadn't become blocked by another creature this combat become unblocked, then it blocks an attacking creature of your choice. Activate only during the declare blockers step.

card.name: Yeet
card.text: Randomly put target creature into its owner's hand, exile, sideboard, commander zone or graveyard.

card.name: Become Ungovernable
card.text: No player controls target creature until end of turn.

card.name: Goblin Mode
card.text: Enchant player Whenever enchanted player is attacked, each player hides at least one item, then all players reveal them simultaneously. Each player loses life equal to the number of items they revealed. The player who revealed the fewest items then loses half their life, rounded up. If two or more players are tied for fewest, each loses half their life, rounded up.

card.name: Challenge Runner
card.text: You can deploy creatures to your opponents. Freerunning {2R} (You may cast this spell for its freerunning cost if you dealt combat damage to a player this turn with an Assassin or commander.)

card.name: Deep Fry
card.text: Whenever another source you control changes the text of an instant or sorcery spell, you may have that spell gain "This spell deals 2 damage to any target."

card.name: Boomer Shooter
card.text: {T}: This creature deals X damage to target creature or planeswalkers, where X is the amount of turns its owner's had since that permanent has been on the battlefield.

card.name: Min Maxer
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may have it get +X/-X until end of turn.

card.name: Mewing Streak
card.text: Enchant creature Cumulative upkeep— Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 until Mewing Streak leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Chug Jug
card.text: You gain life equal to the amount of life you've gained this game.

card.name: Far Even as Decided
card.text: Shuffle a planar deck you own from outside the game into your command zone. Turn the top card of the planar deck face up and its effects become present in the game. Planechase rules now apply to the game.

card.name: Swole
card.text: Square target creature's power and toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Sigma Grinder
card.text: Effects that apply to all creatures on the battlefield don't apply to Sigma Grinder.

card.name: Vine Boom
card.text: Vine Boom deals damage to any target equal to the power of target creature you control, the loyalty of target planeswalker you control or the printed power/toughness box of a permanent you control.

card.name: Heckin' Chonker
card.text: Heckin' Chonker costs {1} less to cast for each different generic mana symbol among permanents you control. Trample

card.name: Gigachad
card.text: Gigachad can't be countered, exiled from the stack, returned to hand from the stack, or not resolve. Trample

card.name: Powerscaler
card.text: Trample, Ward {1} This creature's power is equal to the next creature's with the most power plus 2.

card.name: Leave no Crumbs
card.text: Creature spells you cast have devour 2. (As this enters, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. That creature enters with twice that many +1/+1 counters on it.) Creatures you control have ingest. (Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library.) Put three cards ingested by creatures you control into their owner's graveyard: Conjure a Night Soil into your hand.

card.name: A Cruel Angel's Thesis
card.text: Destroy all permanents without supertypes.

card.name: True Name User
card.text: Whenever you choose a card name, draw a card. Whenever you search your library for a card with a specific name, you may search another one of those cards.

card.name: Magus of Despacito
card.text: First strike Spells can only be cast any time a sorcery could be cast. Abilities can only enter the stack if it's empty.

card.name: Supreme Admin
card.text: Creatures assign combat damage inverse proportionally in relation to the greatest power among creatures on the battlefield.

card.name: Data Scrapper
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Backbone (This creature assigns combat damage equal to its toughness instead of its power.) Permanents can't attach.

card.name: Map Painter
card.text: Whenever a white spell you control that targets successfully resolves, create a Map token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control explores. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Kamioshi
card.text: This creature has all abilities.

card.name: Turn into a Pickle
card.text: Target permanent spell enters the battlefield as a Food token.

card.name: Content Creator
card.text: When Content Creator enters the battlefield, you may pay the cost of anything on the stack, if you do, copy it.

card.name: It's Rewind Time
card.text: Take an extra turn.

card.name: Clever Cyberpunk
card.text: Abilities you control add an additional {C}. This mana can't be used.

card.name: Quantum Rizzler
card.text: Flying Rather than draw cards one at a time, if a player is instructed to draw multiple cards, those cards are drawn all together. Whenever you draw cards, create a 1/1 colorless Shrimp creature token with islandwalk. Splice onto Gamer {1}{U} (As you cast a Gamer spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

card.name: Beyond Belief
card.text: Reveal the top five cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Each player secretly votes for a pile, then those votes are revealed. Put any pile with the most votes into your hand and the other into your graveyard. A pile can't have no cards.

card.name: Stan
card.text: When Stan enters the battlefield, create a token that's a copy of target creature. All effects are copiable values.

card.name: Refuse to Elaborate
card.text: Turn your graveyard face down. If a card would be put into your graveyard from anywhere, put it into your graveyard face down, then shuffle your graveyard.

card.name: The Bart Ender
card.text: As The Bart Ender enters the battlefield, each opponent names a creature card in their deck. Creatures named this way are now named Bart. {T}: Destroy target Bart.

card.name: The Man Behind the Slaughter
card.text: Nightbound (If a player casts at least two spells during their own turn, it becomes day next turn.) After your draw step choose one that hasn't been chosen. If you can't or it's become day, sacrifice this creature — • Create a 2/1 red Fox Animatronic artifact creature under no player's control. It attacks you during each other players' turn. • Play with your hand revealed. • Target opponent creates a Secret Arcade//Dusty Parlor token. Unlocking doors for it costs {W} less. • Another player controls you during your next turn. • Your maximum hand size is reduced to zero.

card.name: Dealer of Loss
card.text: Flying If a player fails to find, that player loses the game.

card.name: The Shareholders
card.text: As this creature enters the battlefield, your opponents become your teammates and your teammates become your opponents.

card.name: Major Skill Issue
card.text: Damage isn't removed from creatures your opponents control during cleanup steps.

card.name: Goncharov
card.text: You may activate abilities and cast spells from your hand as if they were in your graveyard.

card.name: Fukua, Hellrider
card.text: You may reveal this card from outside the game or your hand before starting the game, if you do, ignore higher seeds. Creatures can't not attack.

card.name: L33T H4XX
card.text: Reverse the order of the spells on the stack. Draw a card

card.name: Speedrunner
card.text: Haste When Speedrunner becomes declared attacker, skip to the combat damage step, then sacrifice Speedrunner.

card.name: The Entire Bee Movie Script
card.text: Whenever a spell or ability is put onto the stack, its owner flips a coin, if they lose, that spell or ability becomes a copy of a random Insect card.

card.name: Revengeance Status
card.text: Revengeance Status deals X damage to every number of target. Where X is the number of steps taken during this phase.

card.name: Let's Play
card.text: Players play a Magic subgame, using 3-card blind rules. The winning player adds {R}{R}{R} at the beginning of their next main phase. If the game ended in a draw, each player draws a card.

card.name: Memelord
card.text: Flying Creatures you control get +1/+1 for each other creature you control that'd get +1/+1 from an ability of that creature.

card.name: Aura Farmer
card.text: When Aura Farmer enters the battlefield, Adjudicate (Create a white Aura enchantment token with enchant creature and "Sacrifice this token: Untap enchanted creature" attached to target creature.) Auras you control gain "{T}: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: My Turn on the Xbox
card.text: "Can" effects take precedence over "Can't" effects.

card.name: Dat Boi
card.text: Flash Cast Dat Boi only if there's a spell on the stack. As you cast Dat Boi, target opponent may copy a spell.

card.name: Somebody Once Told Me
card.text: You may cast Somebody Once Told Me without paying its mana cost in response to the first spell cast this game. Reveal the top five cards of your library. Each opponent chooses a card revealed this way not chosen already. Put a card chosen this way into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Absolute Unit
card.text: This creature's power is double the power of the next creature with the most power on the battlefield. This creature's toughness is double the toughness of the next creature with the most toughness on the battlefield.

card.name: Jungle Champion
card.text: Trample, Toxic 3 Trample over noncreature permanents. Whenever a permanent dealt lethal damage by this creature dies, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Big Chungus
card.text: Trample, Haste Whenever Big Chungus attacks, it becomes a trigger event for every triggered ability among permanents on the battlefield.

card.name: Nothing Without You
card.text: Creatures are world.

card.name: Nostalgia Critic
card.text: Protection from traditional [b]MAGIC[/b] cards. (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything traditional MAGIC cards..)

card.name: Organizer of the Symposium
card.text: Vigilance Layers are applied in reverse order.

card.name: Epicsauce
card.text: Create a Function token with "Epic." (It's an enchantment. As you cast an instant or sorcery spell, sacrifice any number of Functions to add their effects to that spell.)

card.name: Lock In
card.text: Whenever an object enters the battlefield or the stack under your control , you draw a card and you lose 1 life. If you fail to maintain game state, you lose the game.

card.name: Sorin Markov Chain
card.text: As this artifact enters, conjure three random Sorin planeswalker cards merged under it. Whenever you draw a card, flip a coin. If you win the flip, put one of the merged Sorin cards into your hand, otherwise, conjure another Sorin planeswalker card and merge it under this artifact.

card.name: Gacha Whale
card.text: As Gacha Whale enters the battlefield, each player gets an emblem with "Whenever you win a coin flip, this emblem deals 1 damage to any target." Combat damage is dealt in the form of coin flips.

card.name: Dog of Wisdom
card.text: Ignore all exceptions.

card.name: Baby Grok
card.text: Trample over permanents. When this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, choose a permanent card with mana value 1 at random, then conjure it into your hand. It perpetually gains "this permanent's base power and toughness is 6/7." If it's not a creature, it still has a printed power/toughness box this way.

card.name: Primordial Hag
card.text: Trample Mana emptying from mana pools causes players to lose that much life. Combat damage utilizes the stack. Players can't cast spells with the same name as a legendary permanent on the battlefield. Players can't play legendary lands with the same name as a land on the battlefield.

card.name: Like // Subscribe
card.text:
Target spell, permanent or player gains hexproof until end of turn.
---
This spell has all abilities of other spells on the stack.

card.name: Forgor // Rember
card.text:
Target player reveals their hand, then puts a card of your choice outside the game.
---
Return target instant or sorcery spell from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Cope // Seethe
card.text:
Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.
---
Seethe deals X damage to target player, where X is the number of cards that have left their hand this turn.

card.name: Smash // Mouth
card.text:
Destroy target artifact. Draw a card.
---
Create a 3/3 green Hippo creature token.

card.name: True // Real
card.text:
You gain hexproof until end of turn.
---
Target permanent you control can't leave the battlefield this turn.

card.name: Block // Report
card.text:
Attacking creatures become blocked.
---
Choose a nonland card name. Target player reveals their hand. Choose a card with the chosen name in that player's hand or graveyard and exile it.

card.name: Virgin // Chad
card.text:
Target creature can't have power greater than 0 until end of turn.
---
Double the power of target creature you control. Sacrifice it at end of turn.

card.name: Drag // Drop
card.text:
Put target creature on the bottom of its owner's graveyard.
---
Put target noncreature permanent on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: Meet // Greet
card.text:
Creatures you control gain Soulbond this turn if they don't have it. Paired creatures you control get +2/+2 this turn.
---
Creatures that entered the battlefield this turn have haste.

card.name: H.R.T // H.R.T
card.text:
Target creature becomes a new object.
---
Target creature becomes a Horse Mount in addition to its other types, gains saddle 1 and "whenever it attacks while saddled, it gains horsemanship" until end of turn.

card.name: Facts // Logic
card.text:
Return this spell to its owner's hand, then discard a card.
---
Counter target spell unless its controller pays 1 for each card put into your graveyard this turn.

card.name: C.B.T // C.B.T
card.text:
Shuffle the cards in your hand into your library, then draw that many cards plus one.
---
This turn, target player's maximum hand size is two.

card.name: Debut // Graduate
card.text:
You may put a creature or planeswalker card from your hand onto the battlefield. That creature gains haste. Sacrifice that permanent at the beginning of the next end step.
---
Exile target creature or Planeswalker

card.name: Rick // Roll
card.text:
Rick deals 2 damage to any target. Damage can't be prevented this turn.
---
Create a number of 3/3 green Elemental creature tokens equal to the number of differently named lands you control.

card.name: Submissive // Breedable
card.text:
Exile target tapped creature.
---
Target creature's controller casts it with offspring {0} without paying its costs. The token copy enters the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Cringe // Based
card.text:
Creatures get -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of times you've held priority this turn.
---
When you next gain priority, return to the battlefield all creatures cards in your graveyard that were put there from the battlefield this turn.

card.name: Netflix // Chill
card.text:
Red noncreature spells cost {2} less to cast.
---
Red spells cost {2} more to cast.

card.name: Flop // Bop
card.text:
Until end of turn, if a player would search a library, they fail to find.
---
Conjure a Birds of Paradise into your hand.

card.name: Cooking // Cooked
card.text:
The next 2 damage that a source of your choice would deal to you and/or permanents you control this turn is dealt to any target instead.
---
Cooked deals 2 damage to every target you don't control that has been dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Copy // Paste
card.text:
Copy target spell you control.
---
Merge target creature under another target creature. They become the permanent on top plus all abilities from under it.

card.name: Spambot
card.text: You may reveal Spambot as you search your library, if you do, Conjure a copy of Spambot and shuffle it into your library.

card.name: Donowall
card.text: Defender Prevent all damage that would be dealt to this creature on turns where you've spent mana from a token source.

card.name: Marketable Plushie
card.text: You may have this creature be a Treasure Token when it's not on the battlefield.

card.name: Merch Drop
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color When you trigger a mana ability, you may return this artifact from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Second Monitor // Subway Surfers
card.text:
---
Each opponent divides all creatures they control into a "left" pile and a "right" pile. Then, for each creature you control, choose "left" or "right." That creature can't be blocked this turn except by creatures in a pile with the chosen label.

card.name: ROFLcopter
card.text: Flying Remove a non-Card object you control from the game: This Vehicle connives, then it becomes a creature until end of turn. Activate only once each turn. (To have a creature connive, draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.)

card.name: Doomscroll
card.text: As this artifact enters the battlefield, reveal a card from your hand. Play with that card revealed. When you cast the card revealed, this artifact deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Skibidi Toilet
card.text: Whenever a noncreature permanent with a printed power/toughness box enters the battlefield under your control, you may have this artifact become an artifact creature with power and toughness equal to the numbers printed on that box.

card.name: Dakimakura
Drifting Itasha
card.text: Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) Exhaust — Skip your turn: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature. Max speed — Whenever you take a shortcut, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Content Farm
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Activate only if this land is fortifying another land. Fortify {1} ({1}: Attach to target land you control. Fortify only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Dogwater Bay
card.text: As long as this land is tapped, it has all abilities of other lands you control. {T}: Add {0}.

card.name: Gamer Nation
card.text: {T}: Each player hides at least one item, then all players reveal them simultaneously. The player who hid the most chooses which color of mana this land adds, then loses life equal to the amount of items they hid.

card.name: Backrooms
card.text: Other players treat this land as if it didn't exist. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: SCP Site
card.text: {T}: Target spell costs {1} less. {T}: Add one mana of any color, spend this mana only on cryptic spells unless you're horrific.

card.name: Patreon Gallery
card.text: Enchant permanent {T}: Add one mana of any of enchanted permanent's colors. If enchanted permanent is colorless, add {C} instead.

card.name: Ohio
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice Ohio: Target player sacrifices a land without a subtype.

card.name: Liminal Space
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color no other land could produce.

card.name: Hawk 2A
card.text: Flying Whenever you attack with two or more creatures in a band, tap this Vehicle. It becomes a creature. It attacks as part of that band.

card.name: Ram Ranch
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your mana pool.

card.name: Gooncave
card.text: As long as you haven't ventured into the Dungeon, Gooncave isn't a creature. Wither {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Banhammer
card.text: Damage dealt by equipped creature to players causes them to lose the game. Equip {8}

card.name: Rockefeller Street
card.text: This land enters tapped. When it does, search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield merged on top of this land, then shuffle.

card.name: Political Compass
card.text: Political Compass is the source of all damage.

card.name: Magic Comprehensive Rules
card.text: Codex — A copy of each legal card in the format.

card.name: Time Cube
card.text: {1}, {T}: Next turn's phases are taken in reverse order.

card.name: Phil Mahar
card.text: If a permanent you control would be destroyed, regenerate it. All zones are public. Excess damage dealt by sources you control is dealt to each opponent.

card.name: Everywhere, at End of Time
card.text: You have no end step. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Torment Nexus
card.text: Damage is dealt in the form of torment. (To torment, a player loses 3 life unless they discard a card or sacrifice a nonland permanent.)
